2606.31484.title: Fork-Think with Confidence
2606.31484.paper_summary: Parallel thinking has enjoyed great success for boosting LLM performance on reasoning tasks without the need for any re-training. However, existing methods follow a think-first-then-decide paradigm, i.e., they first sample multiple reasoning paths, which inevitably leads to overgeneration, then prune or stop unnecessary paths to compensate. In contrast, decide-first-then-think, i.e., first identifying points that are likely to lead to desirable generations, has been underexplored so far. Following this paradigm, we propose Fork-think with confidence, that first identifies forking points using model confidence in a single seeding path, then triggers thinking, sampling multiple continuations and aggregating them for the final response. Our experiments across three models and three reasoning benchmarks show that Fork-think reduces the token consumption by up to 30% and run-time by up to 57%, while performing comparable to or better than parallel thinking. Our analysis reveals that Fork-think is able to identify forking points that are meaningful with respect to the downstream task and that sampling at later positions can lead to substantially better generations. Finally, we demonstrate how combining Fork-think with existing mechanisms such as early stopping and weighted voting can further boost the performance and perform comparably to existing state-of-the-art methods, without requiring any warm-up or offline training. Our results establish pre-determined forking as a promising research direction for efficient LLM reasoning.
2606.31484.paper_summary_zh: 平行思維在提升大型語言模型（LLM）在推理任務上的表現方面取得了巨大的成功，而無需任何重新訓練。<lb/>然而，現有的方法遵循先思考再決策的範式，即它們首先採樣多個推理路徑，這不可避免地導致過度生成，然後修剪或停止不必要的路徑以進行補償。<lb/>相對而言，先決策再思考，即首先識別可能導致理想生成的點，目前尚未被充分探索。<lb/>遵循這一範式，我們提出了「以信心分叉思考」（Fork-think with confidence），該方法首先使用單一種子路徑中的模型信心來識別分叉點，然後觸發思考，採樣多個延續並將其聚合以生成最終回應。<lb/>我們在三個模型和三個推理基準上的實驗顯示，「以信心分叉思考」將標記消耗降低了多達30%，運行時間降低了多達57%，同時表現與平行思維相當或更佳。<lb/>我們的分析顯示，「以信心分叉思考」能夠識別對下游任務有意義的分叉點，並且在後期位置進行採樣可以導致顯著更好的生成。<lb/>最後，我們展示了如何將「以信心分叉思考」與現有機制（如早期停止和加權投票）結合，進一步提升性能，並與現有的最先進方法相當，而無需任何預熱或離線訓練。<lb/>我們的結果確立了預先確定的分叉作為高效LLM推理的一個有前景的研究方向。
2606.31484.author: Zena Al-Khalili et.al.
2606.31484.authors: Zena Al-Khalili, Rafi Hakim, Dietrich Klakow, Ji-Ung Lee
